7 C 7n

Applying to 00000101
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 15 = AND(I 1,I 5) = AND(0,1) = 0
1 AND 26 = AND(I 2,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0
2 AND 37 = AND(I 3,I 7) = AND(0,1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 C 7n = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{00000000}
